name: Brand Strategy & Identity
description: We craft cohesive brand identities that resonate with your audience — from logo and color systems to tone of voice and brand guidelines that scale across every touchpoint.
fullDescription: From discovery workshops to final brand guidelines, we go deep on who you are, who you serve, and how to position you for growth. The result is a complete identity system — logo, colour, type, tone — that works everywhere.

name: Website Development
description: High-performance websites built for conversion. We design and develop with precision — combining cutting-edge tech with pixel-perfect execution to create digital experiences that captivate.
fullDescription: We build with Next.js, Framer, and modern web standards so every site we ship is fast, accessible, and future-proof. From landing pages to full product sites — designed in-house and engineered to perform.

name: SEO Marketing
description: Data-driven SEO strategies that move the needle. We optimize your digital presence to rank higher, drive qualified traffic, and turn visitors into loyal customers.
fullDescription: We don't chase algorithms — we build sustainable organic growth through technical SEO, content strategy, and link authority. Every campaign is tied directly to business outcomes, not just rankings.

name: Packaging Design
description: Packaging that sells before the customer even opens the box. We create tactile, shelf-stopping designs that communicate quality and reinforce your brand story.
fullDescription: Great packaging is a silent salesperson. We handle everything from structural concepts and dieline design to print-ready files and supplier briefs — so your product stands out wherever it's sold.
